title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 20: The Mountain Tree
description: Chapter 20 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 20 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: Master Zhuang was walking in the mountains when he saw a huge tree, its branches and leaves thick and luxuriant. A woodcutter paused by its side but made no move to cut it down. When asked the reason, he replied, 'There's nothing it could be used for!' Master Zhuang said, 'Because of its worthlessness, this tree is able to live out the years Heaven gave it.'
